channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: This vehicle has been sitting here with its engine runng for 40 mins, 22nd March
item.description:
Vehicle has come and sat here for 40 mins with its engine running

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Hopkins Street, Soho, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on the side of the road and path, 22nd March
item.description:
There is a significant amount of litter where the lorries park, with drivers discarding rubbish along the roadside. There are currently no bins in this area. Please could bins be installed, along with cameras if necessary, to help deter and identify those responsible? Additionally, along the pathway on the opposite side of the road, past Tesco, there are also no bins available. As a result, litter has built up along the pathway and surrounding grass banks. Please could more bins be installed in this area, and the litter cleared. Cameras could also be considered if needed to help prevent further issues.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A223, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree roots, 22nd March
item.description:
Treet roots pushing the pavement up. I have to walk with a stick and find it now very difficult to walk along The Chase
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Anne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roots under pavement, 22nd March
item.description:
Tree roots pushing pavement up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Anne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree roots, 22nd March
item.description:
Tree roots bringing the pavement up

item.description:
Big amount

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly tipping on green patch, 22nd March
item.description:
Fly tipping of three piles

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bennett Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Loads of sickening rubbish spread out and overflowing, 22nd March
item.description:
All this rubbish has been there for about a week, it is sickening and attract foxes . Very off putting to walk pass by.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmleigh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped wood, 22nd March
item.description:
Came home from work and wood been dumped on the green next to my house
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Framlingham Crescent, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A tree outside 135 Holmleigh road has VERY LOW branches hanging down and it is very dangerous. It nearly scratched the eye of a passer by., 22nd March
item.description:
This tree belongs to the council and needs to have all hanging branches cut off and removed. The problem has been aggravated by the recent very strong winds.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmleigh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage everywhere, 22nd March
item.description:
Larkhall park is looking like a third world country

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Courland Grove, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 22nd March
item.description:
Dead fox on the green space next to the fence, needs to go before attracts rats and other vermin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Framlingham Crescent, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning, 22nd March
item.description:
Please send a team over to deep clean the street from litter. Thanks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rosina Street, Hackney, London

item.title: Totally blocked pavement with cargo bike, 22nd March
item.description:
Someone has very inconsiderately chained their bike to this lampost and is blocking pathway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Homecroft Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Larkhall park is filthy, 22nd March
item.description:
It’s embarrassing how much garbage there is in Larkhall park. Absolutely shameful.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Courland Grove, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road drain apron damaged, 22nd March
item.description:
Road drain tarmac apron has failed & left a deep, gaping pothole which is quite hard to avoid in heavy traffic.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waltham Cross Interchange, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
